skill_phase_notes.course_complete_celebration: Genuinely acknowledged finishing all 8 lessons. Recapped the full curriculum arc (lessons 1–8) to surface what the user built over the course, and named the through-line: Claude as a collaborator with adjustable depth.
skill_phase_notes.advance: Ended with the exact question from the Course Complete instruction: 'Is there one thing from the course you want to go deeper on? Or one thing you're going to try in your real workflow this week?' — framing whatever they say as the next conversation.

concept_named: Claude as a collaborator with adjustable depth — the through-line connecting all 8 lessons.
connects_to_next_lesson: No next lesson — course complete. Next conversation driven by user's answer to the go-deeper/apply question.
